moments.title: Beach Boys legend Bruce Johnston turns 84
moments.blurb: The Grammy-winning singer, songwriter, and producer, best known for his work with The Beach Boys, celebrates his 84th birthday today.

angles.name: Beach Boys Vibe
angles.copy: Good vibrations for Bruce Johnston of The Beach Boys, who’s celebrating his 84th today! What's your favourite Beach Boys track?

angles.name: Behind the hits
angles.copy: Happy 84th to Bruce Johnston! The man behind some of The Beach Boys' most iconic sounds. Still touring and making waves.

moments.title: Grammy-winner H.E.R. celebrates 29th birthday
moments.blurb: The acclaimed R&B singer, songwriter, and multi-instrumentalist H.E.R. (Gabriella Wilson) turns 29 today.

angles.name: Modern R&B star
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 29th birthday to the incredible H.E.R.! What's your go-to track from her?

angles.name: Talented at 29
angles.copy: 29 today and already a multi-Grammy winner! H.E.R. continues to redefine R&B. Play her loudest!

moments.title: Sixpence None the Richer's Leigh Nash turns 50
moments.blurb: Leigh Nash, the distinctive voice behind Sixpence None the Richer's global hits like 'Kiss Me,' celebrates her 50th birthday today.

angles.name: Kiss Me at 50
angles.copy: Can you believe it's been 50 years? Happy Birthday to Leigh Nash of Sixpence None the Richer! 'Kiss Me' is still a classic.

angles.name: 90s Icon
angles.copy: Happy 50th to the voice of the 90s, Leigh Nash! Sixpence None the Richer gave us some unforgettable tunes.

moments.title: Deep Purple drummer Ian Paice turns 78
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the only continuous member of Deep Purple and one of rock's most influential drummers, will celebrate his 78th birthday on Sunday.

angles.name: Drumming legend
angles.copy: Happy 78th birthday on Sunday to the legendary Ian Paice! The powerhouse behind Deep Purple's sound. What's your favourite drum solo?

angles.name: Deep Purple forever
angles.copy: Celebrating 78 years of rock on Sunday for Deep Purple's Ian Paice! Still an absolute master behind the kit.

moments.title: Men at Work frontman Colin Hay turns 73
moments.blurb: Scottish-Australian singer-songwriter Colin Hay, best known as the lead vocalist of the Grammy-winning band Men at Work, celebrates his 73rd birthday on Sunday.

angles.name: Down Under Legend
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday on Sunday to the iconic Colin Hay! From Men at Work to solo success, his voice is unmistakable.

angles.name: Land Down Under
angles.copy: Can you hear him? Colin Hay of Men at Work turns 73 this Sunday! Still makes us want to visit the Land Down Under.

moments.title: Pussycat Dolls star Nicole Scherzinger turns 48
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, known for fronting The Pussycat Dolls, will celebrate her 48th birthday on Sunday.

angles.name: PCD Power
angles.copy: Don't cha wish you were 48 and fabulous? Happy Birthday on Sunday to Nicole Scherzinger! Still bringing the heat.

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: From Pussycat Dolls to X Factor, Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 this Sunday! A true pop icon.

moments.title: Boomtown Rats bassist Pete Briquette turns 72
moments.blurb: Irish musician Pete Briquette, best known as the bassist for The Boomtown Rats, will celebrate his 72nd birthday on Wednesday.

angles.name: Rat Pack
angles.copy: No 'Monday' for Pete Briquette of The Boomtown Rats, who turns 72 on Wednesday! Wishing him a very happy birthday.

angles.name: Punk Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 72nd to Pete Briquette, the rhythmic backbone of The Boomtown Rats! A true punk and new wave legend.

moments.title: British rapper Monie Love turns 56
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated British rapper Monie Love, a prominent figure in the late 80s and early 90s hip-hop scene, will turn 56 on Wednesday.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Pioneer
angles.copy: Celebrating 56 years of hip-hop royalty! Happy Birthday on Wednesday to the incredible Monie Love.

angles.name: UK Rap Legend
angles.copy: She's 56 on Wednesday! Monie Love, a true UK rap trailblazer, still sounds fresh. What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Singer-songwriter Michelle Branch turns 43
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning American singer-songwriter Michelle Branch, known for hits like 'Everywhere' and 'Are You Happy Now?', celebrates her 43rd birthday on Wednesday.

angles.name: Early 00s Pop
angles.copy: Happy 43rd Birthday to Michelle Branch this Wednesday! Still singing 'Everywhere' at the top of our lungs.

angles.name: Acoustic Pop Star
angles.copy: 43 on Wednesday! Michelle Branch brought us some of the best pop-rock anthems of the early 2000s.

moments.title: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke turns 66
moments.blurb: The influential English songwriter and keyboardist, known for his work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, will celebrate his 66th birthday on Thursday.

angles.name: Synth Lord
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday on Thursday to the undisputed king of synth-pop, Vince Clarke! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, a true legend.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: 66 years young this Thursday! Vince Clarke's electronic genius shaped the sound of the 80s and beyond. Play 'A Little Respect'!

moments.title: Boyzone's Shane Lynch turns 50
moments.blurb: Irish singer and television personality Shane Lynch, best known as a member of the boy band Boyzone, will celebrate his 50th birthday on Thursday.

angles.name: Boyband Icon
angles.copy: It's Shane Lynch's 50th birthday on Thursday! The Boyzone star is still making waves. What's your favourite Boyzone hit?

angles.name: Half Century
angles.copy: From Dublin to global stardom, Shane Lynch turns 50 this Thursday! Celebrate with some classic Boyzone.

moments.title: Genre-blending artist Post Malone turns 31
moments.blurb: American rapper, singer, songwriter, and record producer Post Malone, known for blending genres including hip hop, pop, rock, and trap, celebrates his 31st birthday on Friday.

angles.name: Modern Hitmaker
angles.copy: Raise a solo cup! Post Malone turns 31 this Friday. What's the Posty track you can't get enough of?

angles.name: Pop Crossover
angles.copy: Happy 31st to Post Malone this Friday! He effortlessly blends genres and keeps the hits coming.

moments.title: Huey Lewis of The News turns 76
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actor Huey Lewis, frontman for Huey Lewis and the News, will celebrate his 76th birthday on Saturday.

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: It's the power of love! Huey Lewis turns 76 this Saturday. What's your favourite from Huey Lewis and The News?

angles.name: 80s Rock Star
angles.copy: 76 and still hip to be square! Happy Birthday to Huey Lewis this Saturday, a true 80s legend.

moments.title: Wu-Tang Clan leader RZA turns 57
moments.blurb: American rapper, record producer, and actor RZA, co-founder and de facto leader of the Wu-Tang Clan, will celebrate his 57th birthday on Saturday.

angles.name: Wu-Tang Forever
angles.copy: Protect ya neck! RZA of Wu-Tang Clan turns 57 this Saturday. Drop your favourite Wu-Tang track!

angles.name: Hip-Hop Architect
angles.copy: Happy 57th to the mastermind, RZA! His beats shaped a generation of hip-hop. What a legend.

moments.title: Rap superstar 50 Cent turns 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning American rapper, actor, and businessman 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson) will celebrate his 51st birthday on Sunday.

angles.name: In Da Club
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 this Sunday. Still got 'In Da Club' on repeat?

angles.name: Hip Hop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 51st to the one and only 50 Cent this Sunday! From music to business, he's a true powerhouse.

moments.title: Spandau Ballet drummer John Keeble turns 67
moments.blurb: English musician John Keeble, best known as the drummer for the iconic New Romantic band Spandau Ballet, will celebrate his 67th birthday on Sunday.

angles.name: True Gold
angles.copy: He's 67 this Sunday! Happy Birthday to John Keeble, the man who kept the beat for Spandau Ballet. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: New Romantic Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Spandau Ballet's John Keeble, turning 67 this Sunday! Still got that 'True Gold' rhythm.
